_doc: Single source of truth for every symbol the trading bot tracks.
Edit this file, then run scripts/sync_universe.sh to mirror the lists
Why not just edit .env? Because the dashboard SPA, the stocks wheel
runner, and freqtrade each have a separate way of reading symbols.
Centralizing the list here means one edit propagates everywhere via
Frontend reads /api/universe (added 2026-05-11) to drive Hero strip
RegimeCellLive grids + dashboard dropdowns dynamically. So a restart
of the dashboard alone is enough to push UI changes — re-sync only
needed when you also change which pairs/symbols are actively traded.

crypto._doc: freqtrade trades these; FreqAI auto-trains one TFT model per pair.

_doc: wheel_universe: tickers the wheel runner SCANS for CSP/CC opportunities each cron tick.
dashboard_basket: tickers the operator wants to SEE on the dashboard sparkline card.
tft_training_extra: tickers added to the stocks TFT training set beyond the S&P 500 baseline.
Typically dashboard_basket ⊇ wheel_universe so you can SEE everything the wheel might trade.
All tickers must also appear in _STOCK_SYMBOL_WHITELIST (ops_routes.py).
